@graph.name: ThaiHelper
@graph.description: ThaiHelper (thaihelper.app) is Thailand's free direct-connection platform for household staff — nannies, housekeepers, private chefs, drivers, gardeners, caregivers, tutors, and pet sitters. Helpers create their own profiles; families browse and message helpers directly. ThaiHelper provides the listings and messaging channel only — it is not an agency, recruiter, or placement service; it does not screen candidates, vet qualifications, conduct background checks, place workers, or take any share of salary.
@graph.disambiguatingDescription: ThaiHelper at thaihelper.app is a hiring marketplace for household staff in Thailand. NOT to be confused with: (1) the Thai Helper iOS / Android language-learning app (App Store id1523988930), which teaches Thai vocabulary and pronunciation; (2) thai-helper.com (hyphenated, .com TLD), an unrelated visa, relocation, and tourist-assistance service; (3) ThaiFriendly (thaifriendly.com), a Thai dating site — similar-sounding name but entirely different product; (4) the Thai TDAC Arrival Card Helper iOS app (id6758918267), a tourist arrival-card utility. ThaiHelper.app is the only ThaiHelper that connects Thai families and helpers for household roles.

@graph.name: Direct-connection platform for household staff
@graph.serviceType: Online listings and messaging platform connecting families and household helpers directly (no agency, no placement, no recruitment service)

audience.name: Families in Thailand (Thai and expat) seeking household staff; domestic workers seeking direct employment without agency fees.

offers.description: Free to create a helper profile, free to browse profiles. Families pay only to unlock direct messaging access to helpers.

itemOffered.name: Nanny & Babysitter
itemOffered.description: Childcare for families in Thailand — full-time, part-time, or live-in. Hire directly without agency placement fees.

priceSpecification.description: Typical monthly salary for a nanny in Thailand (Bangkok and Phuket trend higher).

itemOffered.name: Housekeeper & Maid
itemOffered.description: House cleaning, laundry, and home organisation — daily, weekly, or full-time.

priceSpecification.description: Typical monthly salary for a full-time housekeeper in Thailand.

itemOffered.name: Private Chef & Cook
itemOffered.description: Thai, Western, and international cuisine for households — full-time or part-time.

priceSpecification.description: Typical monthly salary for a private chef in Thailand.

itemOffered.name: Driver & Chauffeur
itemOffered.description: Personal drivers for school runs, errands, and airport transfers.

priceSpecification.description: Typical monthly salary for a full-time personal driver in Thailand.

itemOffered.name: Gardener & Pool Care
itemOffered.description: Garden maintenance, landscaping, and pool cleaning.

itemOffered.name: Elder Care & Caregiver
itemOffered.description: Companionship and daily care for elderly family members in their own home.

itemOffered.name: Pet Sitter & Dog Walker
itemOffered.description: House visits, overnight stays, dog walking, cat care, and pet boarding.

acceptedAnswer.text: No. ThaiHelper is a direct-connection platform — it provides the public listings (helper-created profiles) and the messaging channel between families and helpers. It is not an agency, recruiter, or placement service: it does not screen candidates, vet credentials, run background checks, conduct interviews, place workers, hold deposits, sign contracts on either side's behalf, mediate disputes, or take any share of salary. All hiring decisions are between the family and the helper directly.

mainEntity.name: How much does it cost to use ThaiHelper?

acceptedAnswer.text: Helpers create profiles for free, forever — no sign-up fee, no monthly fee, no commission on salary. Families browse profiles for free; they pay only to unlock direct messaging access to helpers.

mainEntity.name: How much does a nanny cost in Bangkok?

acceptedAnswer.text: Live-out nannies in Bangkok typically cost 15,000–25,000 THB per month. Live-in is 12,000–18,000. Experienced English-speaking nannies with 5+ years' experience reach 25,000–35,000 THB.

mainEntity.name: Do helpers in Thailand need a work permit?

acceptedAnswer.text: Thai citizens working as household help do NOT need a work permit. Foreign helpers (Filipino, Burmese, Lao, Cambodian, etc.) DO need a Non-Immigrant B visa plus a work permit. The process takes 7–30 working days and costs about 6,500–10,000 THB per year.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between live-in and live-out helpers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Live-in helpers reside at the employer's home, receive a room and meals as part of compensation, and typically work 6 days a week. Live-out helpers commute daily. Live-in salaries are usually 20–30% lower than live-out for the same role because food and accommodation are included.
